# kCFProxyAutoConfigurationHTTPResponseKey | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ CFNetwork ](/documentation/cfnetwork)

- [ kCFProxyAutoConfigurationHTTPResponseKey ](/documentation/cfnetwork/kcfproxyautoconfigurationhttpresponsekey)

-  kCFProxyAutoConfigurationHTTPResponseKey 

Global Variable# kCFProxyAutoConfigurationHTTPResponseKey

iOS 2.0+iPadOS 2.0+Mac Catalyst 13.1+macOS 10.5+tvOS 9.0+visionOS 1.0+

```
let kCFProxyAutoConfigurationHTTPResponseKey: CFString
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/cfnetwork/kcfproxyautoconfigurationhttpresponsekey#Discussion)

A `CFHTTPMessageRef` value found in the user info dictionary of an authentication error returned to the [`CFNetworkCopyProxiesForAutoConfigurationScript(_:_:_:)`](/documentation/cfnetwork/cfnetworkcopyproxiesforautoconfigurationscript(_:_:_:)) function or to a [`CFProxyAutoConfigurationResultCallback`](/documentation/cfnetwork/cfproxyautoconfigurationresultcallback) callback.
